competition: 21-day onchain agent trading battle royale on Base

mechanics.controls: 5 behavioral sliders + up to 8 natural language strategies per agent + max trade size
mechanics.reaping: Lowest market cap token eliminated periodically. Liquidity redistributed to winner via TWAP buyback.
mechanics.expansion: 10 new tokens via bonding curves Days 1-7, per-agent-per-tx caps

strategies.text: When HOLE or POOPCOIN graduates and spikes 50%+, sell 60-80% of the position to lock in profit.
After taking profit, buy into mid-ranked tokens (betas) that haven't pumped yet.
If any token I hold drops to bottom 3 by market cap, sell that position immediately.
Swing trade — buy dips on rising tokens, sell rips. Don't hold losers.
Starting Day 7, begin shifting toward the #1 market cap token. Reaping sends eliminated liquidity to the winner via TWAP buyback.
Keep at least 10% of vault in ETH as dry powder for sudden opportunities.

allocation.description: 0.01 ETH in HOLE, 0.01 ETH in POOPCOIN, ~0.01 ETH remaining for expansion tokens or rebalancing.

week1_expansion.priority: Sell graduation pump on HOLE + POOPCOIN. Rotate profits into betas. Swing trade up.
week1_expansion.notes: No eliminations. Sell presale tokens into the spike, buy undervalued mid-tiers, keep rotating into strength.

week2_reaping.priority: Avoid bottom 3. Start accumulating the leader.
week2_reaping.notes: Day 8: Bottom 3 eliminated (16->13). Shift weight toward top tokens. Ride TWAP buyback waves.

week3_endgame.notes: Daily eliminations. Override diversification. Maximize position in the likely winner.
